inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $1,697.1M minus capital spending $224.5M, divided by 198.7M diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-20)
inputs.dividend_source: Common stock dividends declared $0.96 per share in 2025 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filed owner cash (OCF minus capex). Paragon 28 acquisition ($1.39B net cash) and related debt issuance ($2.49B) elevated leverage; amortization from Paragon runs through cost of sales. Q1 2026 FCF $245.9M annualizes above FY2025 but base holds filed year until full-year 2026 prints.

bear.notes: Procedure volumes soften; EU MDR and hospital pricing pressure; leverage limits buybacks; multiple compresses toward large-cap med-tech peers

base.notes: Organic constant-currency growth 1-3% per 2026 guidance; robotics/SET mix and U.S. sales-force transition support mid-single-digit owner-cash growth; buybacks ~$250M per quarter pace moderates

bull.notes: ROSA/Monogram robotics adoption accelerates; Paragon 28 foot/ankle cross-sell; margin expansion from mix; sustained $400-500M annual repurchases

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill $9.95B reflects acquisition history; no land/NAV misstatement (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Three geographic segments profitable; consolidated operating margin ~13.3% FY2025 (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog / embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: ROSA robotics, Monogram autonomous knee, smart implants, and Paragon 28 foot/ankle portfolio in revenue path; modeled via growth not separate terminal (Q1 2026 press release; 10-K Business)

option_scan.question: Product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: S.E.T. and Technology & Data categories already in reported sales; Paragon 28 inorganic through April 2026 anniversary

growth_explanation.mechanism: Revenue growth from knee/hip replacement volumes, sports medicine and extremities (Paragon 28), and robotics-enabled procedure pull-through; offset by global hospital pricing pressure and EU MDR recertification costs.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
